utterances.speaker: Elizabeth
utterances.text: Oh please ! It was such a big class ! You never even noticed me !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: What ? Of course I did ! You uh , you sat next to Sleepy Sleeperson .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh uh , I had trouble remembering everyone name , so I ... I kinda came up with nicknames .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Like the guy on the other side of you was Smelly von Brownshirt .

utterances.speaker: Elizabeth
utterances.text: Oh yeah . So umm , did you have a nickname for me ?

utterances.speaker: Elizabeth
utterances.text: Yes you did ! What was it ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Listen , I gotta tell you , I ... I am having a great time !

emotion_cause.span: 11_I ... I am having a great time !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You know how before you said it might be weird , the whole student teacher thing , and to be frank I thought it would be too , but it is not .

emotion_cause.span: 12_you said it might be weird , the whole student teacher thing , and to be frank I thought it would be too , but it is not .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I mean it is not at all .
